steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student must demonstrate that both soundscapes are on the list. A correct answer must name both specific soundscapes and state that both appear on the list — not just one, and not vaguely.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The Japanese Ministry of the Environment made a list of 100 culturally significant soundscapes of Japan.: does not name both soundscapes explicitly, so it fails to show both are on the list — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice B — The sound of birds at the Higashiyama Botanical Garden is on the list.: names only one of the two soundscapes, leaving the other unaddressed — eliminate. ✗
  • Choice C — Both the sound of cicadas at the Yama-dera temple and the sound of birds at the Higashiyama Botanical Garden are on the list.: names both the sound of cicadas at the Yama-dera temple and the sound of birds at the Higashiyama Botanical Garden, and explicitly states both are on the list. Satisfies the goal completely. ✓
  • Choice D — Each soundscape on the list, including the sound of cicadas at the Yama-dera temple, was selected for its cultural significance to Japan.: does not name both soundscapes or confirm both are listed — eliminate. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
